pi_items.source: export_result.sh and verifier.py explicitly target and check this path.
setup_task.sh creates this user via Nx API; verifier.py checks for it in the script content.
setup_task.sh sets this password via Nx API; verifier.py checks for this exact string.
setup_task.sh creates this layout via Nx API; verifier.py checks for this layout name.
verifier.py checks for "--auth" (or URL equivalent), "--layout-name", and a fullscreen flag ("--full-screen", "--fullscreen", or "-fs").

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the target user "kiosk", password "Kiosk123!", and layout "Lobby Monitor" are synthetically generated and dynamically created via the Nx API in setup_task.sh. Verified that export_result.sh and verifier.py explicitly check for the script at "/home/ga/Desktop/launch_kiosk.sh" and require the presence of appropriate command-line flags ("--auth", "--layout-name", and "--full-screen" or equivalents) along with the expected user, password, and layout values.
